title: All You Can Eat
description: A Mod That Adds A Variety Of Foods
body:
All You Can Eat is a forge mod that plans to add a large variety of food items to the game. You can find new crops to grow, new drinks and even new trees that the mod adds.

* All You Can Eat is a forge mod, and there are no plans on porting it to fabric at the moment.
    ![Wines](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71ff2754f80b196c498be6978287c2d956d3df02.png) ![Deserts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59167798a5ee279dca520cc90821eeb8f911cfa6.png) ![Trees](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47746c28e72aeed1a6185ac0f7e74a6553071edd_0.webp) ###### \* [JEI](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei) is recommended to view recipes.
 **Mod Compatibility**
  • Serene Seasons -  Glitchfiend Mods
  • Water Source -  Gloridifice
  • Create -  simibubi
  • Farmer's Delight  - vectorwing
  • Jade -  Snownee
